name: agent-subconscious
description: Local Codex hook spike for next-prompt Subconscious feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Runs the local Subconscious hook spike.
interface.longDescription: Installs local Codex lifecycle hooks that call the Agent Subconscious hook adapter. This is a fixture-backed spike, not the production daemon or reviewer.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Subconscious to run the local hook spike.
